title: neoregelia coriacea
intro: Neoregelia coriacea, also known as the "Flaming Sword," is a species of bromeliad, a type of epiphyte that belongs to the pineapple family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Neoregelia coriacea has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as an anti-oxidant and anti-septic agent. In herbal preparations, Neoregelia coriacea is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
